items.situation: asking a neighbor about noise or shared space
items.speaker: There's loud music coming from upstairs again tonight.

options.A: Oh, was it keeping you up?
options.B: I just bought a new speaker system.
options.C: The recycling truck comes on Tuesdays.
options.D: Thanks, I've been practicing guitar a lot.

items.explanation: 邻居委婉地抱怨这几晚音乐太吵，暗示希望对方注意音量。正确答案A用反问'Oh, was it keeping you up?'回应，主动关心并推进对话，属于counter_question范式。B借'music'联想到买了新音响，属于语义联想陷阱，答非所问。C说回收车周二来，完全离题。D把邻居的抱怨误解成夸奖，回了句'谢谢，我最近常练吉他'，属于误解型干扰项。

items.situation: two friends deciding where to get lunch
items.speaker: Aren't you in the mood for some tacos?

options.A: That restaurant has great reviews online.
options.B: Actually, I'm kind of craving pizza.
options.C: My roommate is visiting her parents.
options.D: It's about a ten-minute walk from here.

items.explanation: 朋友问对方想不想吃塔可。正确答案B以话语标记'Actually'开头，委婉地提出自己更想吃披萨的替代方案，属于marker_led_indirect范式。A借'tacos'联想到餐厅评价，属于语义联想陷阱。C谈室友回家看父母，完全离题。D回答的是'有多远'而非'想吃什么'，属于答错问题类型的干扰项。

items.situation: student asking about a campus event or concert
items.speaker: How much are tickets for the jazz night?

options.A: The jazz band rehearses in the hall every Thursday.
options.B: I left my jacket back in the library.
options.C: Don't worry, I've got a spare one.
options.D: The concert hall seats about five hundred.

items.explanation: 学生问爵士之夜的票价，背后的需求是想去看演出。正确答案C不直接报价，而是用'Don't worry, I've got a spare one'直接解决对方的需求——送一张多余的票，属于context_shift范式。A借'jazz'联想到乐队排练时间，属于语义联想陷阱。B说把外套落在图书馆，完全离题。D答的是'能坐多少人'而非票价，属于答错问题类型的干扰项。

items.situation: student asking a librarian about a book or resource
items.speaker: Where do you keep the old newspaper archives?

options.A: The newspaper club meets in room number twelve.
options.B: My library card expired last month.
options.C: They were digitized a few years ago.
options.D: Are you looking for a specific date?

items.explanation: 学生问图书馆员旧报纸档案存放在哪里。正确答案D用反问'Are you looking for a specific date?'推进对话，先确认需求再指路，属于counter_question范式。A借'newspaper'联想到报社社团开会地点，属于语义联想陷阱。B说借书证上月过期，完全离题。C答的是'什么时候数字化的'而非'放在哪儿'，属于答错问题类型的干扰项。

items.situation: student checking with TA about lab report requirements
items.speaker: Why do we need to include raw data?

options.A: It's all about backing up your results.
options.B: The data center is across campus.
options.C: I finished my chemistry homework early.
options.D: You can attach it all as an appendix.

items.explanation: 学生问助教为什么实验报告里要附原始数据。正确答案A用地道口语'It's all about backing up your results'点明原因——是为了佐证结论，属于idiomatic范式。B借'data'联想到数据中心的位置，属于语义联想陷阱。C说自己早早写完化学作业，完全离题。D答的是'放在哪里/怎么放'（附在附录）而非'为什么'，属于答错问题类型的干扰项。

items.situation: friend inviting another to a study group or social event
items.speaker: We're starting a study group for the midterm.

options.A: The midterm covers the first five chapters.
options.B: Sure, count me in for that.
options.C: My bike got a flat tire today.
options.D: Our tour group leaves at nine tomorrow.

items.explanation: 朋友说要为期中考试组个学习小组，暗含邀请。正确答案B以话语标记'Sure'开头，爽快地答应加入，属于marker_led_indirect范式。A借'midterm'谈考试范围，属于语义联想陷阱，没回应邀请。C说自己自行车爆胎，完全离题。D把'group'误解成'旅行团'，说旅行团明早九点出发，属于一词多义误解型干扰项。

items.situation: student asking about gym or sports facility hours
items.speaker: Aren't they closing the gym pretty soon?

options.A: The gym just added new treadmills last week.
options.B: I left my water bottle at home.
options.C: Our dorm gym stays open all night.
options.D: It's right next to the parking lot.

items.explanation: 学生问健身房是不是快关门了，背后的需求是想找地方锻炼。正确答案C不纠结关门时间，而是提供替代方案'Our dorm gym stays open all night'，直接解决锻炼需求，属于context_shift范式。A借'gym'联想到新添的跑步机，属于语义联想陷阱。B说水杯落在家里，完全离题。D答的是'在哪里'（挨着停车场）而非'是否/何时关门'，属于答错问题类型的干扰项。

items.speaker: What's the best time for your checkup?

options.A: The clinic just hired a new dentist.
options.B: My cousin moved to Chicago last spring.
options.C: Yes, I've been feeling much better.

items.explanation: 对方在帮忙约体检时间，问什么时段最合适。正确答案D用地道口语'Honestly, the sooner the better'表达越早越好，自然得体地回应，属于idiomatic范式。A借'checkup'联想到诊所新招了牙医，属于语义联想陷阱。B说表亲春天搬去芝加哥，完全离题。C把'checkup'误解成问身体状况，答'是的，我感觉好多了'，属于误解型干扰项。
